creator: echo@lethedata.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #5)
"Changelog" for upstream is the project commit history. No separate Changelog file.

A brief rundown of changes between Aug 23, 2024 (8cedd22) and May 28, 2021 (6be2a10) are:
- Makefile Changes
	- structure/format changes
	- BSD specific flags adjusted
- bug fixes
	- \0 delimeter issue
	- disappearing block when signaling
- spelling corrections

https://github.com/torrinfail/dwmblocks/commits/master/
